blended.narrative: Catamount is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light rain showers, highs of 57°F.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
